sentences.section: Exact WKB connection: three non-perturbative effects
sentences.quote: Three non-perturbative effects: modified unitarity |alpha|^2 - |beta|^2 = 1 - delta_k with delta_k = 2 Gamma_H/kappa; FDR-mandated noise floor n_noise = delta_k/2; spectral floor at omega_x ~ T_H ln(2/delta_diss).

sentences.agent_notes: D1 anchor #2 + #6 reproduces from r3. WKBConnection/WKBSpectrum/GreybodyFactor/SpectralFloor all resolve in lean_deps.
